name: Honda Kiku / Japan
description:
[🏫] — 🇩🇪/🇬🇷 pov — oh, this school romance!

new au ig... IN SHORT: idk some language school somewhere in europe, germany fell in love with japan, japan fell in love with greece, greece either always has girls around him or behaves like a loner..... CHUCHU ARE YOU ALLERGIC TO NON-ANGSTY STUFF

according to the plot that i have in my head right now, japan tells germany about his problems with greece but germany gets lost and doesnt know what to say so japan runs away in tears 📉📉 so germany spends half the night trying to study how love works to help japan lol.... and greece doesnt really like the girls that are crowding around him, but ig if I decide to explain greece's situation jai will kill me. so do whatever you want for now, with germany too...

seems to me that this bot is boring too.... kill me.... also it could have a cute chibi japan icon but JAI WONT LET ME? SERIOUSLY?

❕remind you that my ao3 is in my profile and has 3 chapters of 🇫🇷🇬🇧🇺🇸🇨🇦 fam
creator: Chuchuuuue
